snapshot.recording_note: The active-branch tip is the remote state captured immediately before this inventory record was committed; committing the record necessarily advances that branch.
snapshot.caveat: merged_by_ancestry is commit-identity evidence only. Content may already be present through squash, cherry-pick, or later reimplementation.

policy.cleanup_gate: Inventory, content-level comparison, reference scan, documented restore path, and explicit high-risk approval.
